overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, showcasing neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and flying vehicles. The footage transitions between two perspectives of the urban landscape, highlighting the dense, vertical architecture and atmospheric lighting of a high-tech metropolis clearly rendered in a game engine.

segments.scene_description: An aerial drone shot captures a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night, centered on a towering skyscraper with a massive holographic '10' sign. Steam rises from vents below as the camera slowly pans across the neon-lit skyline. Flying vehicles traverse the sky in the distance, adding movement to the atmospheric urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street canyon with neon signage

events.description: camera cuts to street-level aerial view between tall buildings, showing safeway sign

agents.ego_description: moving forward through the street canyon, showcasing the dense vertical architecture and commercial signage

narrow corridor between towering buildings with wet reflective streets below
various illuminated advertisements and corporate logos on building sides
vertical neon signs and glowing windows on high-rise facades

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a street-canyon view, looking down a narrow corridor between skyscrapers. A prominent green 'safeway' neon sign glows in the distance, while the camera moves forward through the dense urban environment. The wet streets reflect the myriad of neon lights from the surrounding buildings, emphasizing the claustrophobic yet vibrant atmosphere of the cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a wide, atmospheric skyline into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit street canyon. It begins by panning across a towering skyscraper dominated by a massive holographic 10 sign, with steam rising from vents and flying vehicles drifting through the distant night sky. As the camera dips lower, the expansive vista narrows into a dense urban corridor flanked by soaring buildings. The scene then shifts focus toward a glowing green Safeway sign in the distance, moving forward through the narrow space. Finally, the perspective settles on the wet streets below, which mirror the vibrant neon lights of the surrounding architecture.
